title: mimulus ringens var. ringens
intro: Mimulus ringens var. ringens, also known as the monkey flower or American monkey flower, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its distinctive bright yellow and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mimulus ringens var. ringens include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, as well as its potential to act as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
